summary: Iteration 4: REGRESSION verification of code-quality refactor (PASS 1 + PASS 2). Backend pytest suite 25/25 GREEN (100%) — bit-identical scoring outputs (domain=72, Structured, Proceed to Constrained Pilot, Moderate, T&E=35, Stakeholder=88, no blockers), blocker downgrade logic preserved, LLM /report endpoint shape preserved, share telemetry preserved. Frontend: yarn build clean with ZERO ESLint warnings. grep confirms no console.* outside lib/logger.js, no key={i}/key={index} anywhere. /report/:id renders all required testids (score-hero-numeral=72, strengths-list, risks-list, remediation-list, 5 dimension-bars), MaturityBandBadge=Structured, ConfidenceChip=Moderate, RecommendationPill=Proceed to Constrained Pilot, Export PDF + Share Briefing buttons. /shared/:token renders executive-abstract testid + SharedHeader (CONFIDENTIAL/Print) + ReportHeader eyebrow + score hero=72 + 5 dim bars + strengths/risks/remediation content + footer. Landing CTAs both navigate correctly. Intake page renders all 3 inputs + 2 textareas + 3 stage buttons + Continue button, autosave AUTOSAVED indicator fires on blur. Assessment workspace renders dimension-nav (6 elements), maturity selectors (36 elements with cumulative-fill), Readiness Pulse 72/100 STRUCTURED MODERATE, live progress update verified (100%→96% on indicator downgrade, SAVING... indicator visible). Zero console errors during interaction.
critical_code_review_comments: Refactor is clean — Report.jsx (374→225) and SharedBriefing.jsx (307→162) successfully share ReportHeader, ScoreHero, InitiativeSummary, DimensionBreakdownSection, BlockersSection, StrengthsRisksSection, RemediationSection. Both consumers correctly opt-in to data-testids via props (Report passes testIds; Shared omits, by design — only executive-abstract is the shared contract).

scoring_engine.score_assessment() decomposition into _score_indicator/_score_sub_dimension/_score_dimension/_compute_domain_score/_compute_confidence/_apply_blocker_overrides/_classify_strengths_risks is bit-identical: pytest TestScoringDemoEvidence and TestBlockerLogic both pass — domain=72, Structured, Proceed to Constrained Pilot, T&E=35, Stakeholder=88, downgrade to Remediate Before Expansion holds.

reasoning_service.py extraction of _strip_code_fences() and _call_llm_for_json() is sound — TestReportLLM passes (real Claude Sonnet 4.5 call); both generate_reasoning + generate_executive_abstract go through the same helper without behavior change.
logger.js production-aware gating is the right pattern — grep across /app/frontend/src confirms zero console.* leaks outside lib/logger.js.
useMemo wrap of dimensions in Assessment.jsx eliminated the prior react-hooks/exhaustive-deps warning — yarn build now compiles with ZERO warnings (previously had 1).
Stable composite keys replaced all key={i}/key={index} — grep confirms zero occurrences in any .jsx/.js file.
seed_data_creation: Created share link on demo (token=G_cmYcYLvmVwOvu_MU4fUVIgm342dm1GLTtNB8xeQY8) for /shared/ regression. Demo current id rotated to cfae2e01-1251-47d3-862e-31bfbaefe9bd during pytest run (test_seed_demo_endpoint re-seeds each test run — by design).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Refactor verified ZERO regressions. Backend suite at /app/backend/tests/test_die_backend.py remains the source of truth (25 tests, run with: cd /app/backend && python -m pytest tests/test_die_backend.py -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/iteration_N_results.xml). Note that test_seed_demo_endpoint mutates /api/assessments/demo/current — always fetch the current id via GET /api/assessments/demo/current at the start of each frontend test run, never hardcode. SharedBriefing intentionally omits strengths-list/risks-list/remediation-list testids (only Report exposes them); only executive-abstract is the Shared contract. Note: Generate Briefing button is suppressed when a report already exists for the demo — not a regression.
rca of the issue: N/A — pure refactor, no regressions detected.
